name: Blackmoor Marshes
description: A vast expanse of fetid swampland where will-o'-wisps dance above bottomless bogs and the dead do not always stay buried. The marshes serve as a natural barrier protecting the Iron Dominion's western flank, but the things that lurk within are no one's ally.

properties.climate: Humid and fog-choked year-round with acidic rainfall
properties.terrain: Treacherous bog, stagnant rivers, and sinking islets
properties.knownThreats: Bog wraiths, marsh trolls, and plague miasma
